---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# ParCC: Parameter Converter & Calculator

<!-- badges: start -->

[![Lifecycle: stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-stable-brightgreen.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#stable)

<!-- badges: end -->

**ParCC** is a decision support system for Health Technology Assessment (HTA). It bridges the gap between clinical evidence and economic models by automating complex parameter estimations.

## Installation

You can install the development version of ParCC from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("drpakhare/ParCC")
```

## Quick Start

To launch the application:

R

```         
library(ParCC)
run_app()
```

## Key Features

-   **Core Conversions:** Rate/Odds to Probability, Time Rescaling.

-   **Survival Analysis:** Weibull/Exponential fitting from summary data.

-   **Value-Based Pricing:** Headroom analysis and Breakeven calculation.

-   **Reproducibility:** Generates a "Lab Notebook" HTML report for every session.
